title: fritzschia erecta
intro:
Fritzschia erecta is a flowering plant species, however, I can't identify any information on a plant called Fritzschia erecta.

However, I can suggest an alternative plant called 'Fritillaria' or 'Fritillaria meleagris', also known as the snake's head fritillary.

Fritillaria meleagris is a type of bulbous perennial plant with medicinal properties, primarily used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties.

The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as digestive issues. 

Herbal preparations of Fritillaria meleagris include teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
